title: Hexaware Technologies Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Hexaware Technologies Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
